series_metadata.series_title: REPORT OF REMITTANCE TO STATE TREASURER
series_metadata.series_description: Contains Department name and number, date, filing offices, amount of deposit and source of revenue of deposits in the general revenue of deposits in the general revenue fund. Serves as transmittal slip accompanying deposits into the general revenue fund

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 2 fiscal years after the close of the fiscal year in which created, or until audit report is released, whichever is later, and then destry., Paper: Wastepaper
